case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. SANTOS, JUNAR L.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, JUNAR L.
UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTOS, JUNAR L. $919.31 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,002.31

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, JUNAR L.
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED.
